title: chore: remove 4 dead apps (2026-06-01)
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
## Dead App Removal

These apps returned 404/410 in **all 3 check rounds** (5 min apart):

- Pollenforge-CLI | https://github.com/ganya002/Pollenforge-CLI/tree/main
- What If? Scenario Explorer | https://whatif.pythonanywhere.com
- AI Pet Name Generator | https://petpetgenerator.cc/ai-pet-name-generator
- JCode Website Builder | https://jcode-ai-website-bulder.netlify.app/

Review before merging. Close this PR to keep all apps.

gist.headline: Pruning the digital garden
gist.blurb: Our automated bot did some light gardening, removing a few inactive community apps to keep the showcase fresh and functional.
gist.summary: Automated cleanup removed four inactive community apps (Pollenforge-CLI, What If? Scenario Explorer, AI Pet Name Generator, and JCode Website Builder) from the APPS.md showcase after they consistently returned 404/410 errors.
gist.impact: The community app showcase remains clean and functional, ensuring users don't encounter dead links when exploring projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing light gardening, sweeping up dead leaves or pulling weeds in a digital garden. The Nomnom creature eating dead links (404 errors).

The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a crumpled paper labeled '404'. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
